changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1 +1 @@
-**File:** `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/context.rs` around line 970

**What:** There is a duplicate section separator comment block for "Locking":
```
    // =========================================================================

    // =========================================================================
    // =========================================================================
    // Locking
    // =========================================================================
```

The first empty section header is a leftover from refactoring. There should be only one Locking section header.

**Why it matters:** Minor readability issue. The extra empty section header is confusing when scanning the file structure.

**Suggestion:**
- [ ] Remove the empty `// =========================================================================` block (the one before the duplicate)
- [ ] Keep only the final `// Locking` header
- [ ] Verify formatting with `cargo fmt`

#warning #warning
\ No newline at end of file
+**Done.** Removed duplicate Locking section header.

- [x] Remove empty duplicate section header
- [x] Keep single Locking header
\ No newline at end of file
